Measuring the Impacts on ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Tax Returns, The Quarterly Journal of Economics, Volume 141, Issue 1, February 2026, Pages 373\u2013427, https://doi.org/10.1093/qje/qjaf053 Clos...", "direct_quote": "Tax Returns, The Quarterly Journal of Economics, Volume 141, Issue 1, February 2026, Pages 373\u2013427, https://doi.org/10.1093/qje/qjaf053 Close - Share Icon Share Abstract A common concern surrounding minimum wage policies is their impact on independen", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Higher wage floors, however, forestall entry, particularly for less productive firms, reducing the number of independent firms operating in ...", "direct_quote": "Higher wage floors, however, forestall entry, particularly for less productive firms, reducing the number of independent firms operating in these industries by roughly 2%.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "We find that firms do not lay off employees but modestly reduce hiring in part-time positions, resulting in 1.5 (or 2%) fewer employment rel...", "direct_quote": "We find that firms do not lay off employees but modestly reduce hiring in part-time positions, resulting in 1.5 (or 2%) fewer employment relationships per firm per year.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
